name: cleanup
description: Clean up temp files by glob and/or delete rows from database tables in one step, collapsing rm -f + psql DELETE chains.

parameters.name: --files
parameters.description: Glob pattern for temp files to delete (repeatable)

parameters.name: --tables
parameters.description: Comma-separated table names to DELETE FROM

parameters.name: --where
parameters.description: WHERE condition for DELETE (default: all rows)

parameters.name: --dry-run
parameters.description: Show what would be deleted without actually deleting

examples.expected: Cleaned 12 temp files, Deleted rows from 6 tables, row counts shown

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses multiple rm -f + su - postgres psql DELETE chains into one step, saving 5-10 agent steps per cleanup phase.
